revision.text:
{{Navbox | title = [[Wikipedia community|Wikipedia community]] | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | bodyclass = hlist | basestyle = text-align: center; | name = Wikipedia community |above=''For a listing of current collaborations, tasks, and news, see the '''[[Wikipedia:Community portal|Community portal]]'''.
For a listing of ongoing discussions and current requests, see the '''[[Wikipedia:Dashboard|Dashboard]]'''.'' | group1 = [[Wikipedia:About|General community
topics]] | list1 = *[[Wikipedia:Administration|Administration]] *[[Wikipedia:News|News]] **''[[Wikipedia:Wikipedia Signpost|The Signpost]]'' **[[Wikipedia:Goings-on|Goings-on]] **[[Wikipedia:Wikipedia in the media|In the media]] *[[Wikipedia:Meetup|Meetups]] *[[Wikipedia:Mailing lists|Mailing lists]] *[[Wikipedia:Wikipedians|Wikipedians]] *[[Wikipedia:Statistics|Statistics]] *[[Wikipedia:The Wikipedia Library|The Wikipedia Library]] *[[Wikipedia:Centralized discussion|Centralized discussion]] *[[Wikipedia:Village pump|Village pump]] **[[Wikipedia:Village pump (idea lab)|Idea lab]] **[[Wikipedia:Village pump (policy)|Policy]] **[[Wikipedia:Village pump (proposals)|Proposals]] **[[Wikipedia:Village pump (technical)|Technical]] **[[Wikipedia:Village pump (miscellaneous)|Miscellaneous]] **[[Wikipedia:Village pump (WMF)|WMF]] *[[Wikipedia:Wikipedia holidays|Holidays]] *[[Wikipedia:Bots|Bots]] | group2 = [[Wikipedia:Contents|Contents]] and [[Wikipedia:Content assessment|grading]] | list2 = *[[Wikipedia:Requested articles|Requested articles]] *[[Wikipedia:Most-wanted articles|Most-wanted articles]] *[[Wikipedia:Requested articles/Images|Images needing articles]] *[[Wikipedia:Requested pictures|Articles needing images]] *[[Wikipedia:Articles for creation|Articles for creation]] **[[WP:AFC/R]] **[[WP:AFC/C]] **[[Wikipedia:Article creation|Creation]] **[[Wikipedia:WikiProject Articles for creation/Help desk|Help]] *[[Wikipedia:Vital articles|Vital articles]] *[[Wikipedia:Articles for improvement|Articles for improvement]] *[[Wikipedia:Peer review|Peer review]] *[[Wikipedia:Good article nominations|Good article nominations]] *[[Wikipedia:Featured article candidates|Featured article candidates]] **[[Wikipedia:Featured list candidates|Lists]] **[[Wikipedia:Featured picture candidates|Pictures]] **[[Wikipedia:Featured and good topic candidates|Topics]] *[[Wikipedia:Translation|Article translation]] **[[Wikipedia:Pages needing translation into English|Pages]] *[[Talk:Main Page|Main Page]] **[[Wikipedia:Main Page/Errors|Errors]] | group3 = [[Wikipedia:WikiProject|WikiProjects]]
and [[:Category:Wikipedia collaborations|collaborations]] | list3 = *[[Wikipedia:WikiProject Council/Directory|Directory]] *[[Wikipedia:WikiProject Council/Directory/Culture|Culture and the arts]] *[[Wikipedia:WikiProject Council/Directory/Geographical|Geographical]] *[[Wikipedia:WikiProject Council/Directory/History and society|History and society]] *[[Wikipedia:WikiProject Council/Directory/Science|Science, technology and engineering]] *[[Wikipedia:WikiProject Council/Directory/Wikipedia|Wikipedia assistance and tasks]] *[[Wikipedia:Patrols|Patrols]] **[[Wikipedia:Recent changes patrol|Recent changes]] *[[Wikipedia:Counter-Vandalism Unit|Counter-Vandalism Unit]] *[[Wikipedia:WikiProject Accessibility|Accessibility]] *[[:Category:Wikipedian organizations|Organizations category]] | group4 = [[Wikipedia:Awards|Awards]] and [[Wikipedia:Positive feedback|feedback]] | list4 = *[[Wikipedia:Reward board|Reward board]] *[[Wikipedia:Contests|Contests]] *[[Wikipedia:A nice cup of tea and a sit down|A nice cup of tea and a sit down]] *[[Wikipedia:Charitableness|Charitableness]] *[[Wikipedia:WikiLove|WikiLove]] **[[Wikipedia:Compliment before criticism|Compliment before criticism]] **[[Wikipedia:Kindness Campaign|Kindness Campaign]] *[[Help:Notifications/Thanks|Thanks!]] | group5 = [[Wikipedia:Maintenance|Maintenance tasks]] | list5 = *[[Wikipedia:Task Center|Task Center]] **[[Wikipedia:Community portal/Open tasks|Open tasks]] *[[Wikipedia:Backlog|Backlog]] **[[:Category:Wikipedia backlog|Category]] **[[:Category:Administrative backlog|Admin category]] * [[Wikipedia:Edit requests|Edit requests]] **[[:Category:Wikipedia edit requests|Category]] *[[Wikipedia:Database reports|Database reports]] *[[Template:Category tracker|Category tracker]] *[[Wikipedia:Database reports/Forgotten articles|Dusty articles]] *[[Special:Specialpages|Special pages]] **[[Special:NewPagesFeed|New pages]] **[[Special:Recentchanges|Recent changes]] *[[Wikipedia:List of controversial issues|Controversial issues]] | group6 = [[Wikipedia:Administrators|Administrators]]
and [[Wikipedia:Noticeboards|noticeboards]] | list6 = *[[Wikipedia:Administrators' noticeboard|Administrators' noticeboard]] **[[Wikipedia:Administrators' noticeboard/Incidents|Incidents]] **[[Wikipedia:Administrators' noticeboard/Edit warring|Edit warring]] **[[Wikipedia:Administrator intervention against vandalism|Vandalism]] *[[Template:Admin dashboard|Admin dashboard]] *[[Wikipedia:Requests for administrator attention|Admin requests]] **[[Wikipedia:Administrators' noticeboard/Requests for closure|Closure]] **[[Wikipedia:Requests for page protection|Page protection]] **[[Wikipedia:Requests for permissions|User permissions]] **[[Wikipedia:Sockpuppet investigations|Sockpuppets]] **[[Wikipedia:WikiProject Open proxies|Open proxies]] *[[Wikipedia:Revision deletion|Revision deletion]] *[[Wikipedia:Oversight|Oversight]] **[[Wikipedia:Requests for oversight|Request]] *[[Wikipedia:Usernames for administrator attention|Usernames]] **[[Wikipedia:Changing username|Changing]] **[[MediaWiki talk:Titleblacklist|Title blacklist]] *[[Wikipedia:OTRS noticeboard|OTRS]] *[[Wikipedia:Bureaucrats' noticeboard|Bureaucrats']] **[[Wikipedia:Requests for adminship|Requests for adminship]] and [[Wikipedia:Requests for adminship#About RfB|bureaucratship]] *[[Wikipedia:Arbitration Committee/Noticeboard|Arbitration Committee]] **[[Wikipedia:Arbitration/Requests|Requests]] **[[Wikipedia:Arbitration/Requests/Enforcement|Enforcement]] | group7 = [[Wikipedia:Dispute resolution#Resolving content disputes with outside help|Content dispute
resolution]] | list7 = *[[Wikipedia:Requests for comment/All|Requests for comment]] *[[Wikipedia:Third opinion|Third opinion]] *[[Wikipedia:Dispute resolution noticeboard|Dispute resolution noticeboard]] **[[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons/Noticeboard|Biographies of living persons]] **[[Wikipedia:Conflict of interest/Noticeboard|Conflict of interest]] **[[Wikipedia:External links/Noticeboard|External links]] **[[Wikipedia:Fringe theories/Noticeboard|Fringe theories]] **[[Wikipedia:Neutral point of view/Noticeboard|Neutral point of view]] **[[Wikipedia:No original research/Noticeboard|No original research]] **[[Wikipedia:Reliable sources/Noticeboard|Reliable sources]] | group8 = Other noticeboards
and assistance | list8 = *[[Wikipedia:Regional notice boards|Regional notice boards]] *[[Wikipedia:Request directory|Requests for help]] **[[:Category:Wikipedia requests related to help|Category]] *[[Wikipedia:Questions|Asking questions]] **[[Wikipedia:Teahouse|Teahouse]] **[[Wikipedia:Help desk|Help desk]] **[[Wikipedia:Reference desk|Reference desk]] **[[Wikipedia:Adopt-a-user|Adopt-a-user]] *[[Wikipedia:Copyright assistance|Copyright assistance]] **[[Wikipedia:Contributor copyright investigations|Copyright investigations]] **[[Wikipedia:Copyright problems|Text problems]] **[[Wikipedia:Media copyright questions|Media questions]] *[[Wikipedia:WikiProject Resource Exchange/Resource Request|Resource requests]] *[[Wikipedia:Proposed mergers|Mergers]] **[[Wikipedia:Requests for history merge|History mergers]] *[[Wikipedia:Requested moves|Moves]] **[[Wikipedia:Requests for page importation|Page importation]] *[[Wikipedia talk:WikiProject Spam|Spam]] **[[MediaWiki talk:Spam-blacklist|Blacklist]] **[[MediaWiki talk:Spam-whitelist|Whitelist]] *[[Wikipedia:Bots/Noticeboard|Bots]] *[[Wikipedia:Education noticeboard|Education]] *[[Wikipedia:General sanctions|General sanctions]] *[[Wikipedia:Editing restrictions|Editor sanctions]] *[[Wikipedia:Long-term abuse|Long-term abuse]] | group9 = [[Wikipedia:Deletion process#Deletion discussions|Deletion
discussions]] | list9 = *[[Wikipedia:Guide to deletion|Guide]] **[[Wikipedia:Deletion guidelines for administrators|Admin]] *[[Wikipedia:XfD today|Today]] *[[Wikipedia:Articles for deletion|Articles]] *[[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion|Templates]] *[[Wikipedia:Files for discussion|Files]] *[[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion|Categories]] *[[Wikipedia:Redirects for discussion|Redirects]] *[[Wikipedia:Miscellany for deletion|Miscellany]] *[[Wikipedia:Criteria for speedy deletion|Speedy]] *[[Wikipedia:Proposed deletion|Proposed]] **[[Wikipedia:Proposed deletion of biographies of living people|BLP]] *[[Wikipedia:Deletion review|Review]] **[[Wikipedia:Requests for undeletion|Undeletion]] *[[Wikipedia:Arguments to avoid in deletion discussions|Arguments to avoid]] *[[Wikipedia:Arguments to make in deletion discussions|Arguments to make]] *[[Wikipedia:Article Rescue Squadron|Article Rescue]] | group10 = [[Wikipedia:Elections|Elections]] and [[Wikipedia:Voting|voting]] | list10 = *[[Wikipedia:Requests for comment|Requests for comment]] ([[m:Requests for comment|meta]]) *[[m:Wikimedia Foundation elections|Wikimedia Foundation elections]] *[[Wikipedia:WikiProject Democracy|WP Democracy]] **[[Wikipedia:Voting is not evil|Voting is not evil]] **[[Wikipedia:Times that 1000 or more Wikipedians supported something|Milestones]] | group11 = [[Wikipedia:Directories and indexes|Directories, indexes,]]
and summaries | list11 = *[[Wikipedia:Department directory|Departments]] *[[Wikipedia:Edit summary legend|Edit summary legend]] *[[Wikipedia:Editor's index to Wikipedia|Editor's index]] *[[Wikipedia:Essay directory|Essays]] *[[Wikipedia:FAQ/Index|FAQs]] *[[Wikipedia:Glossary|Glossary]] **[[Wikipedia:Wikipedia abbreviations|Abbreviations]] *[[Help:Directory|Help]] *[[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Contents|Manual of Style]] **[[Wikipedia:Simplified Manual of Style|Simplified]] *[[Wikipedia:Simplified ruleset|Rules]] **[[Wikipedia:Five pillars|Five pillars]] **[[Wikipedia:List of policies|Policies]] **[[Wikipedia:List of guidelines|Guidelines]] *[[Wikipedia:Shortcut index|Shortcuts]] *[[Wikipedia:Template index|Templates]] **[[Wikipedia:Citation templates|Citation templates]] *[[Wikipedia:Tips|Tips]] **[[Wikipedia:Tip of the day|Today]] *[[Wikipedia:Tools|Tools]] *[[Help:Cheatsheet|Wiki markup]] | below = *[[Commons:Category:Wikipedians|Media]] *[[:Category:Wikipedians|Category]] *[[:Category:Wikipedia templates|Templates]] }} {{Documentation}}
